item.title: Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd Extends Losing Streak to New All-Time Low Amid Steep Decline
item.description: The pace of decline has intensified for Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd, which has now touched an all-time low price of Rs 8.50 on 09 Apr 2026, marking a fresh nadir in its trading history. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Gujarat Containers Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Gujarat Containers Ltd’s stock price declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.144.05 on 09 April 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market weakness and company-specific performance concerns. The stock underperformed its sector and key market indices, reflecting ongoing challenges in both near-term results and long-term growth metrics. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: TechNVision Ventures Ltd Opens 5.09% Lower as Technicals Signal Continued Downside Pressure
item.description: TechNVision Ventures Ltd witnessed a notable gap down at market open on 09 Apr 2026, with the stock price declining sharply by 5.09% to open at Rs 5,855.2. This weak start reflects market apprehensions following recent developments and a downgrade in the company’s rating by MarketsMOJO, signalling a cautious stance among traders and investors. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 50.69
item.description: With a 65.11% gain over the past year, Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 50.69 on 9 Apr 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex's modest 4.21% rise. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum despite a broader market retreat. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Hitachi Energy India Ltd Surges 5.17% to Day's High of Rs 27,187.2 — Outperforms Sector by 5.21 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.73% on 09 Apr 2026 while Hitachi Energy India Ltd surged 5.17%, marking a 5.21-percentage-point outperformance over its Heavy Electrical Equipment sector. This strong single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the mid-cap stock, which hit a fresh 52-week and all-time high intraday price of Rs 27,187.2. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Ujaas Energy Ltd Surges 7.9% to Day's High of Rs 149.9 — Outperforms Sector by 4.39 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.73% on 09 Apr 2026 while Ujaas Energy Ltd surged 7.9%, outperforming its sector by 4.39 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Surges 5.34% to Day's High of Rs 279.85 — Outperforms Sector by 3.27 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.73% on 09 Apr 2026, while Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) surged 5.34%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 279.85. This 3.27 percentage-point outperformance over the Electric Equipment sector’s 2.05% gain highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Anthem Biosciences Ltd Surges 5.83% to Day's High of Rs 728.5 — Outperforms Sector by 4.93 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.68% on 09 Apr 2026, while Anthem Biosciences Ltd surged 5.83%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by nearly 5 percentage points. This strong single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Thermax Ltd. Rallies 5.68% Surpassing All Major Moving Averages — Momentum Gains Steam Amid Sector Strength
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.68% on 9 Apr 2026, yet Thermax Ltd. surged 5.68%, outperforming its sector by 2.46 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event, signalling robust buying interest despite broader market weakness. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Zen Technologies Ltd Surges 8.39% to Day's High of Rs 1561.6 — Outperforms Sector by 7.7 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.66% on 9 Apr 2026, while Zen Technologies Ltd surged 8.39%, marking a 7.7 percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector. This strong intraday gain, reaching a high of Rs 1561.6, stands out as a significant stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 28 minutes ago

item.title: Precision Wires India Ltd Surges 7.14% to Day's High of Rs 328 — Outperforms Sector by 6.69 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.66% on 9 Apr 2026, Precision Wires India Ltd surged 7.14%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 328. This 6.69-percentage-point outperformance over its Industrial Products sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide uplift. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Steelcast Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 275
item.description: With a sustained rally over the past four days delivering a 16.72% gain, Steelcast Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 275 on 9 Apr 2026, outpacing its sector and the broader market despite a declining Sensex. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Voler Car Ltd Surges 20% to Reach All-Time High Amid Strong Momentum
item.description: Voler Car Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price on 09 Apr 2026, reflecting a remarkable surge in its market valuation and a strong performance trajectory over recent periods. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: BSE Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 3,227 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its remarkable rally, BSE Ltd surged 2.98% on 9 Apr 2026 to touch a fresh all-time high near Rs 3,227, outpacing the Sensex which declined 0.66% on the same day. This milestone caps a spectacular run that has seen the stock outperform its sector and benchmark indices across multiple timeframes. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Power Finance Corporation Ltd Surges 3.46% to Day's High of Rs 431 — Outperforms Sector by 3.08 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined by 0.72% on 09 Jun 2026, Power Finance Corporation Ltd rose 3.46%, touching an intraday high of Rs 431. This 3.08 percentage-point outperformance over its Finance sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific strength amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: IFCI Ltd. Rallies 7.6% Amid Mixed Market, Approaching Key Moving Average Resistance
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.72% on 9 Apr 2026, yet IFCI Ltd. surged 7.6%, outperforming its Finance sector peers by 0.86 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a notable event in an otherwise subdued market, raising questions about whether this is a genuine recovery or a technical bounce within a broader trend. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 18.13% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 13.44, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Shreeoswal Seeds & Chemicals Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 18.13% on 9 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: ANI Integrated Services Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.99% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 62.10, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. ANI Integrated Services Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 9 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.88% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 4.30, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.88% on 9 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Sterlite Technologies Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 9.45% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 220.56, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Sterlite Technologies Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 9.45% on 9 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 44 minutes ago
